info.title: Smoo AI API
info.description: The Smoo AI API provides programmatic access to AI-powered customer support, configuration management, knowledge bases, testing infrastructure, and more. Authenticate using OAuth 2.0 client credentials to obtain an access token, then include it as a Bearer token in subsequent requests.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication and authorization. Obtain tokens via OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow for machine-to-machine access.

tags.name: Auth Clients
tags.description: Manage OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Create, rotate, and revoke client ID/secret pairs.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: User profile management. View and update the authenticated user profile.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: AI agent management. Create, configure, and manage AI-powered customer support agents.

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: Organization management. Create and manage organizations that own agents, products, and configurations.

tags.name: Organization Members
tags.description: Organization member management. Invite, update roles, and remove members from organizations.

tags.name: Organization Invitations
tags.description: Organization invitation management. Send, accept, and revoke organization membership invitations.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Product management. Define products and services that AI agents can reference when assisting customers.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: File management and serving. Upload, retrieve, and manage files associated with organizations.

tags.name: Knowledge
tags.description: Knowledge base management. Upload documents and manage knowledge sources that AI agents use to answer questions.

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Background job tracking. Monitor the status of asynchronous operations like knowledge ingestion and agent deployment.

tags.name: Config Schemas
tags.description: Configuration schema management. Define typed configuration schemas with validation rules for your applications.

tags.name: Config Environments
tags.description: Configuration environment management. Create and manage environments (e.g., development, staging, production) for configuration isolation.

tags.name: Config Values
tags.description: Configuration value management. Set, retrieve, and manage configuration values across environments and schemas.

tags.name: Test Cases
tags.description: Test case management. Define test cases with expected inputs and outputs for AI agent validation.

tags.name: Test Environments
tags.description: Test environment management. Configure isolated environments for running test suites.

tags.name: Deployments
tags.description: Deployment management. Track and manage agent deployments across environments.

tags.name: Test Runs
tags.description: Test run management. Execute test suites, view results, and track test coverage over time.

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Social media campaign management. Create campaigns, add platform-specific posts, schedule publishing, and track results.

clientCredentials.name: Smoo Machine / Browser Auth
clientCredentials.description: Machine-to-machine and Browser-to-machine OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow

bearerAuth.name: Smoo User Auth
bearerAuth.description: Smoo User Auth JWT token authentication

TokenRequest.description: OAuth 2.0 token request for client credentials flow

id.description: The unique identifier for the agent.

examplePrompts.description: Example prompts to help users start conversations (max 5, each max 100 chars).

organizationId.description: The organization identifier of the agent.

authPublicClientId.description: The public client identifier of the agent.

authPublicClientSecret.description: The public client secret of the agent.

authPublicClientAllowedOrigins.description: The allowed origins of the agent.

agentName.description: Override display name for the chat widget (falls back to agent.name)

requireName.description: Whether to require name from users

requireEmail.description: Whether to require email from users

requirePhone.description: Whether to require phone number from users

widgetConfig.description: Configuration for the chat widget appearance and behavior.

preset.description: Personality preset that defines the agent's communication style

creativity.description: Creativity level from 0 (very structured) to 1 (highly creative)

persona.description: Custom persona description that defines the agent's character and behavior (max 1000 characters)

personality.description: Configuration for the agent's personality and behavior traits.

template.description: Template used to create this agent.

visibility.description: Where this agent is accessible (public widget or internal dashboard).

role.description: customer (default, built by the org) or smoo_builder (auto-provisioned org admin assistant).

isBuiltin.description: True only for the built-in Smoo Builder agent. Cannot be deleted; role is locked.

toolId.description: Tool identifier — snake_case only (e.g., knowledge_search, notify_humans, jira, github, slack, gohighlevel)

enabled.description: Whether this tool is enabled for the agent

authLevel.description: Authentication level required before this tool can execute

enabledTools.description: List of tools enabled for this agent

toolConfig.description: Configuration for agent tools and integrations.

mode.description: Agent sees every knowledge document in the organization, including any added later.
Agent sees only the listed folders + documents.

folderIds.description: Folders to include (every doc in these folders, including ones added later).

documentIds.description: Specific documents to include in addition to anything from selected folders.

oneOf.description: Subscribe to specific folders and/or documents.

knowledgeSelection.description: SMOODEV-775 — which org-scoped knowledge this agent can search. Default `all_org`; `selected` lets the agent subscribe to specific folders and/or documents. DB column is NOT NULL with a default, so reads always return a value; create can omit it to take the default.

goal.description: Overall goal the agent is driving toward across the conversation.

id.description: Stable identifier for this step, referenced by `next` and graph state.

intent.description: Short natural-language description of what the agent should try to accomplish on this step (e.g. 'Greet the caller and confirm their name').

criteria.description: Objective criteria the judge evaluates to decide whether the step was satisfied this turn. Prefer observable outcomes over vibes.

next.description: Step id to advance to once criteria are met. Omit on terminal steps.

items.description: A single step in a structured conversation workflow.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps. The first step is the starting point; step advancement follows `next` or falls through to the next element in the array.

conversationWorkflow.description: Structured goal + steps for multi-turn conversation flow. Optional — freeform-prompt agents work without this.

enabled.description: Whether the agent should look up an inbound caller against the CRM and use the matching contact for personalization.

allowedFields.description: Allowlist of CRM contact field names that may be surfaced to the agent. A hard-exclude regex (password|token|secret|ssn|card|bank|auth) is applied AFTER this filter — if any allowed field name matches, it is dropped regardless of allowedFields.

disclosureMessage.description: Optional first-turn disclosure shown to the caller, e.g. "I have your account on file — let me know if that's not you."

callerIdentityResolution.description: SMOODEV-670 — opt-in CRM contact lookup for personalization. UX only, NEVER an auth signal (phone/email headers are spoofable).

voiceProfileId.description: SMOODEV-799 — reference to a row in voice_profiles. NULL means use the system default voice (Aria — peppy).

greeting.description: SMOODEV-798 / SMOODEV-932 — channel-agnostic initial greeting seed. composeChannelGreeting rephrases this per channel (voice, chat, sms). NULL falls back to per-channel defaults.

createdBy.description: The user identifier of the agent.

createdAt.description: The date and time the agent was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the agent was last updated.

Agent.description: Agent entity with all fields including auth credentials

UpdateAgentRequest.description: Request body for updating an agent

DeleteAgentResponse.description: Response when an agent is successfully deleted

id.description: The unique identifier for the job.

description.description: Optional description of what the job does

result.description: Job result data (only set when status is completed)

code.description: The code of the error, e.g. "not_found"

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code of the error.

completedAt.description: When the job completed (success or failure)

createdAt.description: The date and time the job was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the job was last updated.

summary.example: A helpful AI assistant for customer support 🤖

example: How can I help you today?

PublicAgent.description: Public agent information for unauthenticated access

GenerateConfigRequest.description: Request body for AI-guided agent config generation

CreateAuthClientRequest.description: Request body for creating an auth client

secretKey.description: The secret key for M2M clients — shown only once

publicKey.description: The public key for B2M clients — shown only once

CreateAuthClientResponse.description: Response when creating a new auth client

UpdateAuthClientRequest.description: Request body for updating a B2M auth client

fallbackEnvironmentId.description: When a key is not found in this environment, fall back to this environment. Chain depth capped at 5.

CreateConfigEnvironmentRequest.description: Request body for creating a config environment

fallbackEnvironmentId.description: When a key is not found in this environment, fall back to this environment. Chain depth capped at 5.

UpdateConfigEnvironmentRequest.description: Request body for updating a config environment

name.description: The name of the config schema (e.g., "default", app name).

description.description: A description of what this config schema is for.

jsonSchema.description: The JSON Schema definition for this config.

CreateConfigSchemaRequest.description: Request body for creating a config schema

name.description: The name of the config schema (e.g., "default", app name).

description.description: A description of what this config schema is for.

currentVersion.description: The current version number of the schema.

jsonSchema.description: The JSON Schema definition for this config.

UpdateConfigSchemaRequest.description: Request body for updating a config schema

ConfigSchemaVersion.description: A versioned snapshot of a config schema

changeDescription.description: Description of what changed in this version

PushVersionRequest.description: Request body for pushing a new schema version

PushVersionResponse.description: Response after pushing a new schema version

ConfigValue.description: A configuration value scoped to a schema and environment

schemaId.description: The config schema this value belongs to

environmentId.description: The environment this value is set for

tier.description: The tier: public, secret, or feature_flag

SetConfigValueRequest.description: Request body for setting (upserting) a config value

values.description: Array of config values to set

BulkSetConfigValuesRequest.description: Request body for bulk-setting config values

matchedRuleId.description: The id of the rule that fired, if any.

rolloutBucket.description: The 0-99 bucket the context was assigned, if rollout ran.

source.description: Which branch the evaluator returned from.

allOf.description: Job entity with status, result, and metadata

id.description: The ID of the knowledge document. Set internally by the server.

name.description: The name of the knowledge document.

sourceUrl.description: The source URL for website type documents.

fileId.description: Optional reference to a file in storage.

sourceFileId.description: Optional reference to a source file in storage.

folderId.description: Optional reference to a folder that organizes this document.

organizationId.description: Reference to the organization that owns this document.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this document was created. Set internally by the server.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when this document was last updated. Set internally by the server.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the file (e.g., application/pdf, image/jpeg).

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

filename.description: Name of the file to upload

FileUploadRequest.description: Request body for file upload preparation

fileId.description: ID of the created file record

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for uploading the file

path.description: Path where the file will be stored

fileId.description: ID of uploaded file to process

ProcessDocumentRequest.description: Request body for processing a document into knowledge

urls.description: URLs to crawl and process. A single URL is treated as a seed and crawled (follows links); multiple URLs are scraped individually.

crawlLimit.description: Max pages to crawl from a single seed URL. Default 50. Ignored when urls.length > 1.

crawlMaxDepth.description: Max link-discovery depth from the seed. Default 2. Ignored when urls.length > 1.

ProcessWebsitesRequest.description: Request body for processing websites into knowledge

DeleteKnowledgeDocumentResponse.description: Response when a knowledge document is successfully deleted

content.description: Markdown content of the knowledge document

UpdateKnowledgeDocumentContentRequest.description: Request body for updating knowledge document content

sourceFileId.description: ID of the original source file

CreateProcessedFileRequest.description: Request body for creating a processed file record from Python service

fileId.description: ID of the created processed file record

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for uploading the processed content

path.description: Path where the processed file will be stored

CreateContentFileRequest.description: Request body for creating a file from content (internal endpoint for AI service)

fileId.description: ID of the created file record

path.description: Path where the file is stored

knowledgeDocumentIds.description: Knowledge document IDs to associate with the agent

AgentKnowledgeAssociationRequest.description: Request body for associating knowledge documents with an agent

UpdateKnowledgeDocument.description: Request body for updating a knowledge document

CreateOrganizationMemberInvitationReques.description: Request body for creating an organization member invitation

accentColor.description: The accent color of the organization (hex format).

icon.description: The icon URL of the organization.

secondaryColor.description: The secondary brand color of the organization (hex format).

tailwindPalette.description: Generated Tailwind CSS color scales keyed by color role.

encryptionKey.description: Current per-org encryption key (encrypted with master key).

encryptionKeyPrevious.description: Previous per-org encryption key (kept during rotation).

createdBy.description: The user identifier who created the organization.

createdAt.description: The date and time the organization was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the organization was last updated.

id.description: The unique identifier for the purchased product.

organizationId.description: The organization that owns this purchased product.

purchasedBy.description: The user ID who purchased this product.

orderId.description: Foreign key reference to the orders table containing Stripe data.

stripeProductId.description: Foreign key reference to the stripe_products table.

trialEndsAt.description: When the trial period ends. Null for admin-bypassed products.

createdAt.description: The date and time the product was activated.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the product record was updated.

Product.description: Product entity with organization, order, and Stripe product relationships

id.description: The unique identifier for the profile (matches auth user id).

email.description: The email address of the user.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

smsOptIn.description: Whether the user has opted in to SMS communications (app notifications).

smsOptInDate.description: The date the user opted in to SMS communications.

emailOptIn.description: Whether the user has opted in to email communications (app notifications).

emailOptInDate.description: The date the user opted in to email communications.

marketingSmsOptIn.description: Whether the user has opted in to SMS marketing communications.

marketingSmsOptInDate.description: The date the user opted in to SMS marketing communications.

marketingEmailOptIn.description: Whether the user has opted in to email marketing communications.

marketingEmailOptInDate.description: The date the user opted in to email marketing communications.

profilePicture.description: Profile picture file ID or URL.

source.description: Marketing attribution data (UTM parameters, referrer, etc.).

createdAt.description: The date and time the profile was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the profile was last updated.

ProfileWithAdminRoles.description: User profile entity with admin roles - excludes sensitive auth tokens

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

smsOptIn.description: Whether the user has opted in to SMS communications (app notifications).

emailOptIn.description: Whether the user has opted in to email communications (app notifications).

marketingSmsOptIn.description: Whether the user has opted in to SMS marketing communications.

marketingEmailOptIn.description: Whether the user has opted in to email marketing communications.

profilePicture.description: Profile picture file ID or URL.

source.description: Marketing attribution data (UTM parameters, referrer, etc.).

UpdateProfileRequest.description: Request body for updating user profile - excludes non-updatable fields
